#+title: Link variety

A file that contains every kind of org link the scanner needs to
classify.

* Inline links

An [[id:22222222-3333-4444-5555-666666666666][id link]] to another node.

A [[https://example.com][https link]].

A [[file:another.org::*Heading][file link with headline]].

A [[file:another.org::#custom-id][file link with custom id]].

A [[roam:Some Title][legacy roam link]].

* Citation

A bibliographic citation: [cite:@nora2023; @smith2020 p. 41].

* Multi-line body

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet. See [[id:22222222-3333-4444-5555-666666666666]]
for the canonical note. Multiple links to the same target are normal
and should all be recorded.
